TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_West_sahara, title = West_sahara, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/West_sahara} }

S.FORM: West sahara hya' ga cyux maki' tay 24 30 N, 13 00 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 266,000 sq km (maki' tay 78 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 266,000 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 587,020. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 18.80%, lhlahuy hya' ga 2.70%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 78.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Laayoune. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Brahim Ghali, aring ryax 9 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

West sahara hya' ga cyux maki' tay 24 30 N, 13 00 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 266,000 sq km (maki' tay 78 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 266,000 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 587,020. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 18.80%, lhlahuy hya' ga 2.70%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 78.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Laayoune. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Brahim Ghali, aring ryax 9 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: wes~…ēt s~…ēańßara ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** w na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ** …£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a laajoune. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ő≤rańßim …£ńßali, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
